import React from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import api from '../api/api'; import ProfileForm from '../components/ProfileForm'; import RiskForm from '../components/RiskForm'; import CalorieUpload from '../components/CalorieUpload'; const Dashboard = ({ profile, setProfile }) => { const navigate = useNavigate(); const fetchProfile = async () => { try { const response = await api.get('/profile'); setProfile(prev => ({ ...prev, ...response.data.profile, latestRisk: response.data.latestRisk, name: response.data.name })); } catch (err) { console.error("Profile Fetch Error:", err); } }; const isProfileIncomplete = !profile.age || !profile.height || !profile.weight; const getRiskColor = (risk) => { switch(risk) { case 'High': return 'text-red-600 bg-red-50'; case 'Medium': return 'text-orange-600 bg-orange-50'; case 'Low': return 'text-green-600 bg-green-50'; default: return 'text-gray-600 bg-gray-50'; } }; return (
{/* Header Section */}

Welcome back, {profile.name || 'User'}!

Track your health journey and achieve your wellness goals

{/* Quick Stats Bar */} {profile.bmi && (
Body Mass Index 📊

{profile.bmi}

BMI Score

Basal Metabolic Rate 🔥

{profile.bmr}

Calories/Day

Health Risk Level ❤️

{profile.latestRisk || 'N/A'}

Current Assessment

)} {/* Main Content Grid */}
{/* Profile Card */}
👤

Profile & Update

{/* Health Risk Card */}
❤️

Health Risk Check

{isProfileIncomplete ? (

⚠️ Please complete Age, Height, and Weight to check your health risk.

) : ( )}
{/* Calorie Upload Card */}
📷

Calorie Estimation

{/* Analytics Section */}
📈

Daily Analytics & Progress

Visualize your health journey over time

📊

Weight Tracking

Weight vs Time chart will appear here

🍎

Calorie Insights

Intake vs Target visualization coming soon

); }; export default Dashboard;
